title: Unit Testing World Settings
description: Startup settings for the XREngine Unit Testing World. Use this schema with the JSONC settings files. Hover descriptions explain what each property controls, and enum-backed properties expose selectable values in VS Code.

$schema.description: Optional schema pointer used by editors. Ignored by the runtime loader.

$id.description: Optional document identifier. Not consumed by the runtime settings loader.

EditorType.description: Selects which editor UI pipeline to create for unit testing.

CameraUIDrawSpaceOnInit.description: Controls draw space and offscreen mode for unit testing camera UI.

TransformTool.description: Adds the transform tool to the scene for testing dragging and rotating etc.

AllowEditingInVR.description: Allows the user to edit the scene from desktop in VR.

PreviewVRStereoViews.description: Shows the VR left/right eye render targets side-by-side in a screenspace UI (requires VRPawn).

VideoStreaming.description: Adds a video streaming component to the scene for testing video streaming.

VideoStreamingAudio.description: Adds a video streaming audio component to the scene for testing video streaming audio.

VideoStreamingUrl.description: Stream URL used by the video streaming test component.

UltralightWebView.description: Adds an Ultralight web view component to the scene for testing web page rendering.

UltralightWebViewUrl.description: Page URL used by the Ultralight web view test component.

EnableProfilerLogging.description: Enables Engine.Profiler frame logging even without Dear ImGui.

RiveUI.description: Adds a Rive UI component to the scene for testing Rive animations.

GPURenderDispatch.description: Uses GPU render dispatch for rendering instead of CPU culling and issuing draw calls.

StartInPlayModeWithoutTransitions.description: Starts in play mode immediately without the edit->play transition.

Skybox.description: Adds a skybox to the scene

Spline.description: Adds a 3D spline to the scene.

DeferredDecal.description: Adds a deferred decal to the scene.

AddCameraVRPickup.description: Adds a camera pickup to the scene for testing VR camera pickup.

Mirror.description: Adds a mirror to the scene for testing mirror reflection.

DynamicWaterQuad.description: Adds a tessellated dynamic-water preview quad with grab-pass refraction, foam, and animated sphere/capsule eddy interactors. Best tested on the OpenGL unit-test path.

InitializeVolumetricFog.description: Adds a demo volumetric fog volume to the default unit-testing world and enables volumetric fog on the unit-test camera(s).

ForceDebugOpaquePipeline.description: Forces the debug opaque render pipeline instead of the default pipeline.

LightProbe.description: Selects which light-probe layout gets added to the scene.

LightProbeCapture.description: Controls whether light probes capture never, once on startup, or continuously.

LightProbeCaptureMs.description: Interval between realtime captures, in milliseconds.

StopRealtimeCaptureSec.description: Optional realtime capture timeout, in seconds. Use null to keep realtime capture running.

LightProbeResolution.description: Capture cubemap resolution used for individually spawned light probes.

LightProbeGridCounts.description: Probe counts used by Grid and ModelGrid layouts.

LightProbeGridSpacing.description: Spacing between probes for Grid and ModelGrid layouts.

LightProbeGridCenter.description: Center/offset for Grid and ModelGrid layouts.

LightProbeSinglePosition.description: World position for Single light-probe mode.

UseOpenXR.description: If true and VRPawn is enabled (and not emulated), initializes VR via OpenXR instead of OpenVR.

EmulatedVRPawn.description: Enables an emulated VR pawn for testing without a VR headset. All this does is disallow OpenVR from starting, VRPawn must still be enabled.

Locomotion.description: Enables the player to physically locomote in the world. Requires a physical floor.

ThirdPersonPawn.description: If on desktop and character pawn is enabled, this will add a third person camera instead of first person.

CharacterControllerCapsuleTranslationY.description: World-space Y translation to apply to the character controller capsule/root on spawn. If null, UnitTestingWorld will pick a safe default that places the capsule just above the floor.

PhysicsChain.description: Adds a jiggle physics chain to the character pawn.

PhysicsBallCount.description: The number of physics balls to add to the scene.

Microphone.description: Adds a microphone to the scene for testing audio capture.

AttachMicToAnimatedModel.description: If true, the microphone output will be attached to the animated model instead of the flying camera.

VMC.description: Adds a VMC capture component to the avatar for testing.

LipSync.description: Adds a lip sync component to the avatar for testing.

FaceMotion3D.description: Adds a face motion 3D capture component to the avatar for testing.

FaceTracking.description: Adds a face tracking component to the avatar for testing.

AnimationClipVMD.description: Imports a VMD animation clip for testing.

HumanoidPoseAuditEnabled.description: Exports raw humanoid playback samples for Unity/XREngine comparison.

IKTest.description: Adds an simple IK test tree to the scene.

TestAnimation.description: Adds test animations to the character pawn.

AllowShaderPipelines.description: Indicates if the engine should use shader pipelines to mix and match shader stages. This will break debug shape rendering, and seems to render slower than making combined programs.

CreateUnitBox.description: If true, creates a 1x1x1 box at the origin.

UseForwardForTransparent.description: When true and  is , materials whose textures have alpha channels will use forward (lit) shaders instead of deferred shaders, giving proper transparency blending for those meshes. Materials without alpha stay in the deferred pipeline.

ImportFlags.markdownDescription:
Comma-separated Assimp `PostProcessSteps` flags. Keep the exact symbolic names separated by commas. Common presets:

- Static environment mesh: `CalculateTangentSpace, JoinIdenticalVertices, Triangulate, GenerateNormals, SplitLargeMeshes, ImproveCacheLocality, OptimizeGraph, OptimizeMeshes, SortByPrimitiveType, FlipUVs`
- Animated character import: `Triangulate, FlipUVs, GenerateNormals, CalculateTangentSpace, JoinIdenticalVertices, SplitLargeMeshes, ImproveCacheLocality, OptimizeGraph, OptimizeMeshes`
- Preserve authored normals/tangents where possible: `Triangulate, FlipUVs, JoinIdenticalVertices, SplitLargeMeshes, ImproveCacheLocality, OptimizeGraph, OptimizeMeshes`

Frequently used individual flags include `Triangulate`, `FlipUVs`, `GenerateNormals`, `CalculateTangentSpace`, `JoinIdenticalVertices`, `SplitLargeMeshes`, `ImproveCacheLocality`, `OptimizeGraph`, `OptimizeMeshes`, and `SortByPrimitiveType`.

defaultSnippets.label: Static environment preset
defaultSnippets.description: High-quality static environment import flags used by the Sponza-style test scenes.
defaultSnippets.body: CalculateTangentSpace, JoinIdenticalVertices, Triangulate, GenerateNormals, SplitLargeMeshes, ImproveCacheLocality, OptimizeGraph, OptimizeMeshes, SortByPrimitiveType, FlipUVs

defaultSnippets.label: Animated character preset
defaultSnippets.description: Balanced preset for animated FBX-style character imports.
defaultSnippets.body: Triangulate, FlipUVs, GenerateNormals, CalculateTangentSpace, JoinIdenticalVertices, SplitLargeMeshes, ImproveCacheLocality, OptimizeGraph, OptimizeMeshes

defaultSnippets.label: Minimal cleanup preset
defaultSnippets.description: Conservative cleanup when you want fewer import-time transforms.

SplitSubmeshesIntoSeparateModelComponent.description: When true, each imported submesh gets its own ModelComponent instead of grouping all submeshes from the same source node into one ModelComponent. Increases GPU resource usage; leave false unless per-submesh scene nodes are needed.

YawPitchRoll.description: Optional additional local-space rotation to apply after import. Values are degrees.

Translation.description: Optional world-space translation offset to apply to the imported root. Values are engine world units after import scaling.
